creator: vanderh@ecf.utoronto.ca
text:
On Fri, May 21, 1999 at 05:11:17PM -0700, Bill Fenner wrote:
> 
> If it's acceptable to make the port depend on TK, then:
> 
> CONFIGURE_ARGS=	--with-wish=/usr/local/bin/wish8.0
> 
> RUN_DEPENDS=	wish8.0:${PORTSDIR}/x11-toolkits/tk80

Why not just configure it for wish8.0 but leave out the RUN_DEPENDS.
I believe that's how it was in the original port, without generating
any complaints.


-- 
This .sig is not innovative, witty, or profund.
